Title: DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_OR_NULL_AGG
Description: Returns a vector of passed values ingoring NULL arguments.

DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_OR_NULL_AGG returns a vector of passed values.
    Similar to DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_AGG() but returns NULL
instead of an empty vector if no arguments were passed or only NULLs were passed.
The order of items in the vector is not predefined and may vary from run to run.
Examples:
SELECT DB.DBA.BAG_OF_NONNULLS_OR_NULL_AGG (subquery.X)
FROM (SELECT X FROM ... ORDER BY X) as subquery
